steps.notes: Queried Notion AI Brief Story Pool for W23 Candidate stories (W24 not yet available). Pulled all ~35 Candidate stories with full row data, grouped by client relevance. Client profiles and hard sensitivities staged alongside in candidate-pool.json + candidate-pool-continued.json.
actions: notion_exec: POST /data_sources query for W23 Candidate stories
write: staged candidate-pool.json + candidate-pool-continued.json with ~35 stories + 7 client profiles

steps.notes: All 7 clients completed with 5 tailored stories each: Incserv (compliance focus), M&T Bank (banking-regulatory focus), Brown Advisory (investment-strategy focus), Alpine Associates (activist-dislocation focus), KPS Life (embedded-expert leverage), ChristianaCare (patient-safety focus), Luna Diabetes (engineering-velocity + regulatory). All hard sensitivities respected.
